title: Kalakalakuthu Lyrics Badri
stanzas:
kalakalakuthu kalakalakuthu
kolusu saththam kalakalakuthu
engal veettukkul dhevathai
vandhuvittaa paaththuko

en annan tholmaele
poomaalai aanaale.
anbaale nam veettai
aalum rani aanaale.

kalakalakuthu kalakalakuthu
kolusu saththam kalakalakuthu
engal veettukkul dhevathai
vandhuvittaa paaththuko

anni un vadivil
annaiyai paarthen
anbinai paarthen
indha sondham oru
aanantham

ondril ondraaga
nenjangal kalakkum
.. thudikkum
indha vazhkai oru
aanantham

thirumangal ellaame
sorgathile mudivaagum
anni ival thirumanamo
sorgathaiye uruvaakkum

neengal tharum
anbinile kuzhanthai
ena maarudhu en manam.

kalakalakuthu kalakalakuthu
kolusu saththam kalakalakuthu
engal veettukkul dhevathai
vandhuvittaa paaththuko

thambi un kurumbai
ival miga rasippaal
thavarugal seithaal
thaaiyai pola ival
kandippaal

thambi nee iravil
thaamathamaaga
veettukkul vandhaal
mutti poada solli
thandippaal

anni oru sol sonnaal
adangiduven anbaale
iraivanukku nandri solvom
ival namakku
kidathathu oru varam

kalakalakuthu kalakalakuthu
kolusu saththam kalakalakuthu
engal veettukkul dhevathai
vandhuvittaa paaththuko

en annan tholmaele
poomaalai aanaale.
anbaale nam veettai
aalum rani aanaale.

kalakalakuthu kalakalakuthu
kolusu saththam kalakalakuthu
engal veettukkul dhevathai
vandhuvittaa paaththuko

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kalakalakuthu?

The song is an energetic and celebratory dance number that captures the joy and excitement of a festive occasion.

Who composed the music for Badri?

The music for Badri was composed by Ramana Gogula.

Who is the singer of Kalakalakuthu?

The song is sung by the talented Shankar Mahadevan.

What is the release year of the movie Badri?

The movie Badri was released in the year 2001.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kalakalakuthu is a lively and upbeat song from the movie Badri, capturing the essence of celebration and joy. The song features vibrant beats and energetic vocals by Shankar Mahadevan, making it a perfect fit for festive occasions. It conveys a sense of happiness and excitement, as it describes the arrival of a divine presence in a household. The song's lively rhythm and joyful lyrics make it a favorite for parties and celebrations.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kalakalakuthu from the movie Badri is a vibrant and energetic track that brings the festive spirit alive. With Shankar Mahadevan's powerful vocals and Ramana Gogula's dynamic composition, this song is a perfect blend of rhythm and joy. Dive into the celebratory beats and let the music take over your senses.
stanzaMeanings: The sound of anklets is jingling, a goddess has come into our house, look.
My brother has a garland on his shoulder. With love, she has become the queen ruling our house.
From now on, the sweet sound of the morning will always be heard in our house.
The sound of anklets is jingling, a goddess has come into our house, look.
Sister-in-law, in your form, I saw a mother. I saw love, and this relationship is a joy.
Hearts are united as one, beating together. This life is a joy.
All the wealth in heaven will end, but her marriage will create heaven itself.
In the love you give, my heart turns into a child.
The sound of anklets is jingling, a goddess has come into our house, look.
Brother, she enjoys your mischief a lot. If you make mistakes, she will surely correct you like a mother.
Brother, if you come home late at night, she will scold you and make you bow.
There is no one to oppose and defeat me.
If sister-in-law says a word, I will obey. With love, we thank God for this blessing we have received.
The sound of anklets is jingling, a goddess has come into our house, look.
My brother has a garland on his shoulder. With love, she has become the queen ruling our house.
From now on, the sweet sound of the morning will always be heard in our house.
The sound of anklets is jingling, a goddess has come into our house, look.
